title: Untitled Game

issues.evidence: quality_score=0.175 (bottom 10%), logs_captured=0 (no logging), token_count=0 (incomplete game), minimal sprites/sounds (incomplete)

suggestions.title: Reduce initial difficulty spike
suggestions.description: Game currently unplayable (0% completion). Reduce starting challenge significantly.
implementation_steps: Find initial spawn rate or enemy count

suggestions.title: Add visual/audio feedback for player actions
suggestions.description: Add sprite animations, particle effects, or sounds when player acts.
suggestions.code_location: Add sound effects (sfx) or sprite animations in update functions
implementation_steps: Add sfx(n) calls in player action handlers

suggestions.title: Add progression milestones
suggestions.description: Create levels, waves, or difficulty stages to show progress.
suggestions.code_location: Add level/wave counter, display progress to player

suggestions.title: Implement core game loop
suggestions.description: Game appears mostly empty. Implement basic game mechanics.

suggestions.title: Add sprite animations
suggestions.description: Create visual sprites for player, enemies, and effects.
suggestions.code_location: Draw sprites in draw_play() and draw_gameover()
implementation_steps: Add spr() calls in draw functions

suggestions.title: Add sound effects and music
suggestions.description: Games with audio are more engaging. Add SFX and background music.
suggestions.code_location: Add sfx() and music() calls throughout gameplay
implementation_steps: Play SFX on key events (jump, score, hit)

summary:
CRITICAL: Game is unplayable (0% completion). Implement suggestion #1 immediately to reduce initial difficulty.
Implement suggestions in priority order. Retest after each change.
